name: Creamy Dijon-Tarragon Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a 3-quart saucepan (salt optional). Add potatoes and cover.
2. Heat until boiling, then reduce heat. Simmer for 20-25 minutes or until tender.
3. Meanwhile, mix remaining ingredients in a large bowl.
4. Drain the potatoes and let them cool slightly.
5. Peel the potatoes if desired.
6. Cut the potatoes into 1/4-inch slices.
7. Gently stir the potato slices into the salad dressing mixture.
8. Cover and refrigerate for about 4 hours or until chilled.
